## Description

SwiftUI + RealityKit 4 component patterns for the You-Sir Juan OS iOS kiosk app. Covers AvatarRealityView, KioskMode, EnrollView, ParadigmIcon, and the three immersion levels (L1 SwiftUI / L2 hybrid RealityView / L3 full physics).
